productDisplayName: Puma Women Conrad Reversible Pink Beanie Cap
description: Get two for the price of one! This puma hat is designed to be reversible - turn it inside out to get two different looks. Offering snug comfort, this beanie is a great way to beat the chill and enjoy those long winter walks. Made of 100% knit acrylic fabric Nearly seamless stitching for abrasion-free comfort Stripes on both the sides, with puma labelling on either side Care Hand wash in warm water and line dry Do not dry clean, bleach, wring or iron
